title: Savory Korean Beef Stir-fry with Glace Cherries
description: This savory dish combines tender beef with sweet glace cherries in a spicy sauce for a dense and sour Polish-inspired meal.
instructions: Mix together glace cherries, onions, chili flakes, mustard sauce, soy sauce, and vegetable oil in a bowl.
Place the mixture on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes or until cherry skins are slightly translucent.
Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Add beef sirloin and cook until browned on all sides (about 5-7 minutes).
Remove beef from wok and set aside. In the same wok, add more oil if needed and sauté onions until soft.
Add the cherry mixture back to the wok with the cooked beef. Stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes.
Serve hot as a main dish.
